name: excalidraw-agent-mcp
description: Local-first Mermaid-to-Excalidraw boards for Codex, Claude, VS Code, and other MCP clients.
long_description: A local-first fork of the Excalidraw MCP App server. Agents can convert Mermaid into durable editable Excalidraw boards, add information panels, reopen and version boards, save manual edits in a standalone local editor, export portable .excalidraw files, and still use the upstream streaming MCP App experience.

tools.name: read_me
tools.description: Returns the Excalidraw element format reference with color palettes, examples, and tips. Call this before using create_view.

tools.name: create_view
tools.description: Renders a hand-drawn diagram using Excalidraw elements with streaming draw-on animations.

tools.name: create_board
tools.description: Creates a durable editable Excalidraw board from Mermaid source and notes.

tools.name: get_board
tools.description: Reads a board, its Mermaid source, notes, and current version.

tools.name: update_board
tools.description: Updates a versioned board while protecting concurrent manual edits.

tools.name: export_board
tools.description: Returns a portable .excalidraw file or document.

tools.name: delete_board
tools.description: Deletes a durable board after client approval.
